fields.title: Remove Pi-session execution config dependencies from Ralph
fields.description: After Ralph stores and applies its own execution contract, Ralph should stop reading or writing Tau execution/sandbox config through Pi custom session entries as part of loop correctness.
fields.design: Audit Ralph and adjacent code for dependencies on TAU_PERSISTED_STATE_TYPE and loadPersistedState in loop start/resume/child-session setup. Move the data needed by Ralph into loop state and treat Pi custom entries as runtime plumbing only when a Pi API requires them for child session initialization. Delete old Ralph-specific project settings and hidden mutable locals that duplicate the loop contract. Keep Pi session id/file references because Pi remains the runtime kernel.
fields.acceptance_criteria: Ralph loop correctness is determined by .pi/loops/state plus task file, not by tau:state custom entries in the active Pi session; stale Pi custom entries cannot alter Ralph child tools/agents/model/sandbox; obsolete Ralph project-settings policy is removed; and tests cover stale session state not changing Ralph behavior.
